examples: The overall ambience of the room is cosy.
Ambience was important in playing the Chinese zither. Usually, it was practised in quiet setting and never for public performance.
Ambience was important in playing the guqin.
The food at Azalea is luxurious (sake-marinated Chilean sea bass with shrimp dumplings), the ambience hip.
Actually, most of the time the cabin ambience resembles that of a busy machine shop.
